'''Sabit''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[X'Ting]] who was the wife of [[Caiza Quill]] by the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], she was present with many members of the Five Families that took refuge in a secret bunker. In the end, Sabit, along with her husband and half of the family, perished in the destruction of the bunker.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]]
